nasb.text: and with him ten chiefs, one chief for each father’s household from each of the tribes of Israel; and each one of them was the head of his father’s household among the thousands of Israel.

esv.text: and with him ten chiefs, one from each of the tribal families of Israel, every one of them the head of a family among the clans of Israel.

cnv.text: 又派十個首領與非尼哈同去，每一個都代表以色列的支派家族；他們是全體以色列各家族的領袖。

ccb.text: 又从每支派差遣一位族长，共十位随行。
